title: Cielo sulla palude
writer: Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Augusto Genina, Elvira Psorulla
actors: Rubi Dalma, Michele Malaspina, Domenico Viglione Borghese
plot: In 1902 in the disease-ridden Pontine Marshes, a disease-ridden region, 12-year-old Maria Goretti lives with her parents, poor farmhands, in the house of Serenelli, a heavy-drinking farmer who offered them board and lodging. Seren...
